description_long: This helmet features a domed, angular shell with a dark green finish and visible weathering, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The front is dominated by a T-shaped black visor bordered by a deep red frame, providing a distinctive and iconic look. On the right side, a yellow rangefinder attachment extends upward, adding a functional and technological element. The left side displays three yellow rectangular markings above the visor, while the rear includes a large, rectangular metallic gray panel and a yellow module, likely for communication or environmental control. The surface is mostly matte with some scuff marks and scratches, suggesting frequent use. The overall design is reminiscent of a sci-fi or bounty hunter aesthetic, with strong visual cues from popular media.
description: A weathered, green helmet with a T-shaped black visor, red trim, and a yellow rangefinder attachment, featuring battle-worn details and sci-fi styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped black visor, red trim, and yellow markings above the visor.
description_view_1: Rear view reveals a large metallic gray panel and yellow module, with the rangefinder visible at the top.
description_view_2: Left side view highlights the smooth green dome and the yellow rangefinder attachment extending upward.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the yellow module and the red visor trim wrapping around the side.
attribute_graphic_design: Solid green with red trim, three yellow rectangular markings, and a weathered, battle-worn finish.
